2394840.name: Lucy's Adventure
2394840.description:
Step into the shoes of Lucy as she navigates the challenges of growing up, from an innocent child to a rebellious teen, and finally an adult dealing with her past. Experience her world full of weird humor and eerie moments. Make choices that shapes Lucy’s future, play cute minigames, and uncover different endings based on your decisions.

Features:

• Explore Lucy's eerie, funny world

• Story-driven, narrative experience

• Enjoy a variety of minigames

• Shape Lucy's future with your decisions and discover different endings
2394840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
